modules/Packages-LillistCore-Sources-Lil.summary: Stateless CLIBridge command handlers translating tokenized intents into store mutations and DTO reads
CLIBridge command handlers for restore, search, show, status, tag, tags, and watch flows
Serializes store DTOs into the CLI's json/ndjson/tsv/pretty output formats
Shared load-bearing primitives for the CLI and Shortcuts — store location, task resolution, date/filter parsing
Canary-based crash detection plus opt-in, redacted, user-mediated crash reports
On-disk JSONL diagnostic event log, history-derived attribution, and export-package builder
Versioned JSON+assets backup bundle writer/reader for the full Core Data store
URL unfurl pipeline — SSRF-gated fetch, OpenGraph parsing, and metadata persistence via AttachmentStore
Hand-written @NSManaged subclasses — the private Core Data row types that stores read/write and DTOs are projected from
Core Data schema (xcdatamodeld) and the persisted enums that type its raw integer/string columns
Notification scheduling, permissions, snooze, and cross-device de-dup for LillistCore
Gap-based fractional ordering math and canonical sibling sort for reorderable rows
Core Data stack ownership, sync-mode store swapping, Trash purge, history tracking, and quarantine safety net
Recurrence rule types, pure-Swift occurrence expansion, and next-instance spawning for Series
Smart-filter rule engine — predicate AST types, twin NSPredicate/Swift evaluators, date resolution
Core Data facades for attachments, journal, preferences, series, smart filters, tags, plus TaskStore query/follow-up extensions
TaskStore — the single async gateway for all LillistTask CRUD, reorder, status, soft-delete, and tag ops
Sync-mode migration engine, gate guard, journal, CloudKit event bridge, and iCloud account/status primitives
Observable CloudKit sync-state value types and the actor that aggregates events into them
Cross-cutting LillistCore primitives — error type, device prefs, onboarding, logging taxonomy, validators

modules/Packages-LillistCore-Sources-lil.summary: swift-argument-parser command structs for the lillist CLI; thin shells over CLIBridge handlers
ArgumentParser command structs (search through watch) that thin-wrap CLIBridge handlers and stores
Shared CLI plumbing — output/color flags, stdin batch tokens, exit codes, crash-canary lifecycle
lillist CLI entry point — root command, subcommand registry, and LillistError-to-exit-code dispatch

modules/Packages-LillistCore-misc.md.summary: SwiftPM manifest, Core Data model-compile build plugin, and package README for LillistCore

modules/Packages-LillistUI-Sources-Lilli.summary: Cross-platform AX helpers — reduce-motion/contrast modifiers, VoiceOver announcements, WCAG contrast math
Shared SwiftUI row and surface widgets consumed by both iOS and macOS app targets
SwiftUI crash-report consent sheet and its observable view model over LillistCore's CrashReporter
Custom drag-reorder engine for hierarchical task lists — state machine, geometry, hit-testing, and overlay rendering
Unified task editor — draft/live lifecycle model, quick/full presentation, and all editor sub-sections
Pure-presentation onboarding and iCloud-gate screens shared across iOS and macOS app targets
Inline text parser and date-suggestion chips for `#tag ^date` Quick Capture entry
SwiftUI recurrence-rule editor plus a value-type summary it renders to localized text
Shared Settings UI helpers — iCloud sync section, sort-field labels, crash report preview, date picker utility
Pure-presentation SwiftUI sheets and dialogs for the iCloud sync-mode change and pause-explainer flows
Rainbow Glass design tokens — colors, hues, gradients, glass seam, button/toggle styles, status/sync/tag palettes
Design tokens — spacing, radius, timing, semantic typography, drag-reorder constants, and tag tint default
Tree-building, flat-projection, sort, and filter-UI primitives for the iOS Tasks outline screen
iOS-only LillistUI surfaces — FAB, Quick Capture dialog, toasts, sync badge, and the Tasks/Settings screen shells
LillistUI package root — landing namespace, status-cycle state machine, and UI-facing sync indicator protocol

modules/Packages-LillistUI-misc.md.summary: SwiftPM manifest for the LillistUI library — products, platforms, deps, and build flags
